provenance: IOC Sea Level Station Monitoring Facility (ioc-sealevelmonitoring.org), station code 'mani' (Manila), VLIZ/IOC
note: Connectivity + format sample only. Full single-day response is ~67 KB of 1-minute records across sensors (prs=pressure, bat=battery/aux). Sea level in metres. Records around the PCSO draw epoch 13:00 UTC shown.
